_comment: Structure-aware segments of an ESG regulatory standard (SASB-style). The pipeline reads segments in order, proposes an ESGMKG type from each heading prefix, mints a deterministic id, and runs two-phase validation. Two segments are deliberately invalid: a 'Tagline:' heading (hallucinated type -> phase-1 reject) and a 'Calculation Model:' segment that 'applies to ... industry' (CalculationModel cannot appliesToIndustry -> phase-2 reject).

segments.heading: Framework: SASB
segments.text: The SASB framework defines industry-specific sustainability disclosure standards.

segments.heading: Category: Greenhouse Gas Emissions
segments.text: Greenhouse gas emissions metrics for the energy sector.

segments.heading: Metric: Scope 1 Emissions
segments.text: Gross global Scope 1 emissions in metric tons CO2-e. Computed by GHG Protocol model. Applies to the oil and gas industry.

segments.heading: Metric: Scope 2 Emissions
segments.text: Gross global Scope 2 emissions from purchased electricity. Computed by GHG Protocol model.

segments.heading: Calculation Model: Location-Based Method
segments.text: Location-based method for grid average emissions factors. Applies to the utilities industry.

segments.heading: Tagline: Net Zero Leader
segments.text: Our corporate brand commitment to a sustainable future.
